  • Method Details

    • createDefaultRegistry

      @Internal static DynamicRegistry<WolfSoundVariant> createDefaultRegistry()
      Creates a new instance of the "minecraft:wolf_sound_variant" registry containing the vanilla contents.
      See Also:
      • to get an existing instance of the registry
